notes: The engineering reading of BG 2.58 is reproducible in code or org practice, not pure metaphor. highly actionable: the capacity to withdraw and redeploy attention is trainable; the family-time / work / on-call sequence is reproducible in code or org practice. The named tools (Slack, Datadog, Twitter, Sentry, GitHub, PagerDuty) instantiate the doctrine in concrete operational terms that an engineer could check against their own practice this week.
